message:
fix: add DashboardHeader to compliance pages and match enterprise sidebar width (#9934)

- Replace manual headers in LicenseComplianceDashboard and
  SigningStatusDashboard with DashboardHeader (Tip/Auto/refresh controls)
- Disable resize on enterprise sidebar to prevent width drift from the
  locked 256px default

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@ const SIDEBAR_FEATURES = {
   addMore: true,
   clusterStatus: true,
   collapsePin: true,
-  resize: true,
+  resize: false,
   activeUsers: true,
 } as const
